title: LNE Archers Add-On
description: Loot & Explore Add-On with Archers (RPG-Series ) related Content, like new Structures, Weapons etc.
body:
## LNE x Archers (RPG-Series) Add-On💎🏹
![Archer Outpost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zl6rTul9/images/e2aca4152e5cc6c9263afe25b027144fb0f5b1ae.png)

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/LNE-Archers-Add-On)

## 📂 Installation
### 🚨Required Mods
- [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) (RPG-Series)
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)

### 🤝Integrated Compatibility
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) ( Additional Archer Weapons )
- [Archers Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers-expansion)

## 🕹️ Features
- Loot & Explore is only a optional Dependency, if you dont want the special Archer Weapons and just want the class related structures, you dont have to install the L&E Mod, or you can disable the equipment in the config.

### ⚔️Equipment
- Special Shortbows, Longbows, Rapid Crossbows, Heavy Crossbows & Spears can be crafted with new Smithing Template Upgrades (Only if Loot & Explore is installed)
- Each weapon has their own unique passive ability🪄
![Archer Equipent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zl6rTul9/images/a8ff3fbd8ae4d4fecdf68a1782b2aa0f885c039b.png)

### 🏚️Structures
- Find new Archer related Structures while exploring!
- Loot the chests and get rewarded with equipment related to this rpg class
- You can rarely find Spell Books with bound spells in these structures
![Archer Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zl6rTul9/images/3e7d9e71f2ff1152fd33fb719fa30d6fa98133f7.png)

## 🎥Showcases

## 🧑‍🔧Roadmap
- More Archer related Structures
- 1.21.x Port 
- New Spells & Spell Books
- Archer Themed Enemies
- New Spells/Spell Books for each class
- More Special Weapons

## 🙌Credits
- Deadelus - for creating the Archer Mod and inspiring this Add-On
- [Emil](https://emil.art/) for creating the cute Mod Icon's

Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
